text:
The department shall issue specialty license plates for members of the United States armed services who have been awarded the Special Warfare Insignia. The license plates must include:

(1) the words “Navy SEALs”; and

(2) a depiction of the United States Navy Special Warfare Insignia.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.327 (Presidential Service Badge) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(54), eff. September 1, 2023.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.328 — United States Navy Seals

The department shall issue specialty license plates for members of the United States armed services who have been awarded the Special Warfare Insignia. The license plates must include:

    (1) the words “Navy SEALs”; and

    (2) a depiction of the United States Navy Special Warfare Insignia.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.327 (Presidential Service Badge) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(54), eff. September 1, 2023.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 130 (H.B.3401), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2021.*
